subcodes.first_line: This is a letter from this Wronged One to one of the chosen ones of God, glorified be His majesty, who beareth witness unto that which the Wronged One hath witnessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه ایست از این مظلوم بیکی از اولیای حق جل جلاله یشهد بما شهد المظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @prayer for protection, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
